metadata.title: Welcome to Taiwan GeoDoc Hub
metadata.description: Taiwan GeoDoc Hub is a SaaS platform designed for Taiwanese land data users, providing land snapshot analysis and announcement value query functions, supporting multi-tenant, multi-role, and point system management.

form.description: By logging in, you agree to our <TermsOfUse>Terms of Use</TermsOfUse> and <PrivacyPolicy>Privacy Policy</PrivacyPolicy>.
